title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four decision-making rules that Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei reportedly use to determine what's worth building with Claude. The video distills publicly available information from the founders into a framework intended to help individuals and businesses avoid building the wrong products with AI.
